subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! What shall I pen, and what shall I write? My soul yearneth for the precincts of the Beloved, and my heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله چه نویسم و چه نگارم جان هوای کوی جانان دارد و دل
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
